hotels.name: Hyatt Regency Chicago
amenities: Conference rooms and meeting spaces available
hotels.meeting_space_details: Multiple conference rooms available for hourly or daily rental. Rooms range from 400-2,000 sq ft with AV equipment, whiteboards, and catering services available. Estimated cost: $150-400 per day depending on room size.

activities.activity: Hotel Check-in and Conference Room Setup
activities.description: Arrive at hotel, check in, and set up your meeting space. The hotel staff can assist with AV equipment and room configuration.
Modern American tavern in the Loop, perfect for business lunches with excellent food and professional atmosphere.
Dedicated meeting time in your reserved conference room with coffee and refreshment service.
activities.notes: Conference room rental with basic refreshments

activities.description: Upscale Italian restaurant perfect for business dinners, located in River North near the Loop.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Wildberry Pancakes and Cafe
activities.description: Popular breakfast spot in the Loop known for excellent coffee and hearty breakfast options.
Continue your business meetings in the hotel conference room.
Quick, healthy lunch option in the Loop with options for various dietary preferences.

activities.activity: Walking Tour of Millennium Park and Cloud Gate
activities.description: Take a break from meetings to explore Chicago's iconic Millennium Park and see 'The Bean' sculpture. Great for team bonding and fresh air.

activities.activity: Farewell Dinner at The Signature Room at the 95th
activities.description: Celebrate the end of your business trip with stunning views from the 95th floor of the John Hancock Center. Upscale dining with panoramic city views.
Quick breakfast at hotel before heading to the airport.

activities.activity: Transportation to O'Hare and Airport Departure
activities.description: Uber/Lyft to O'Hare International Airport for 6:15 PM flight (arrive early for security).

plan.reasoning: This itinerary is designed for a 3-person business trip from New York to Chicago from October 20-22, 2026. The Hyatt Regency Chicago was selected because it's located in the Loop as requested, offers extensive conference room and meeting space facilities, and the nightly rate of $285 is within the $300 per night budget. The hotel is ideally positioned for business travelers with easy access to Chicago's business district. The itinerary balances productive meeting time with team meals and a brief cultural activity at Millennium Park. Flights are scheduled to maximize time in Chicago while keeping costs reasonable. Total estimated cost is $2,985 for all 3 travelers ($995 per person), which includes flights ($1,140 total), hotel ($570 for 2 nights), conference room rental ($400), meals, activities, and ground transportation.
plan.final_message_to_user:
I've created a comprehensive 2-night business trip itinerary for your group of 3 colleagues traveling from New York to Chicago (October 20-22, 2026).

**Highlights:**
✈️ **Flights**: Round-trip from LaGuardia to O'Hare - $1,140 total ($380 per person)

🏨 **Hotel**: Hyatt Regency Chicago in the Loop - $285/night (within your $300 budget)
- Prime Loop location with river views
- Multiple conference rooms available for rental
- Business center, WiFi, and professional amenities
- Total: $570 for 2 nights

📊 **Meeting Spaces**: Conference room rental included for approximately 8 hours across 2 days ($400 total)

🍽️ **Meals & Activities**: Professional dining venues suitable for business discussions, plus a team-building visit to Millennium Park

💰 **Total Cost**: $2,985 for all 3 travelers (approximately $995 per person)

The itinerary provides dedicated meeting time while allowing for productive meals and a brief cultural experience. The Hyatt Regency's central location means everything is walkable or a short ride away. All conference rooms come with AV equipment and the hotel can arrange catering if needed.
